data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the requirement of copying a link to share via any channel. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly demonstrate that the generated temporary link can be copied and shared through various channels. The linked use case describes the generation of a temporary link but lacks any details or evidence regarding the functionality to copy this link for sharing, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence provided that confirms the ability to copy the generated link for sharing via any channel.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
